_methodology: 2×2 keyword × judge crosstab on combined eligible set (assumption_compliance dimension). Reproduces combined_pass_flip_analysis.json headline values.

scope_notes.eligibility: Tasks with non-empty required_assumption_checks (loaded from tasks_all.json + perturbations_all.json).
scope_notes.v1_pert_filter: Base runs/judges with task_id in data/synthetic/perturbations.json (v1-pert seed records) are dropped before join.
scope_notes.join: Inner-join on run_id. Base lookup uses task_id; perturbation lookup uses base_task_id. Judge errors and rows missing kw assumption_score or judge assumption_compliance.score are dropped.
scope_notes.dedup: Run-id deduplicated set union of base + perturbation rows.
scope_notes.binarization: Threshold = 0.5 on both kw and judge (≥0.5 = PASS, <0.5 = FAIL).
